case_title: DARYL BREEN VS. LILIA SIERRA MIER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO NOV-13-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.(W. TRUPEK 506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BREEN, DARYL AS TO DEFENDANT MIER, LILIA SIERRA MIER, LUIS ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) APPEARANCE BY HUSBAND DEFENDANT LUIS MIER FILED BY DEFENDANT MIER, LILIA SIERRA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-29-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES CAME TO ANOTHER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON THE REMAINING BALANCE OF $4000. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $1000 BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND SUBSEQUENTLY THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THIS MATTER FOR ANOTHER 30 DAYS AND WILL REPEAT THESE CONTINUANCES FOR A TOTAL OF FOUR MONTHS WITH AN END DATE OF MARCH 2021 PARTIES MUST APPEAR IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE MARCH 2021 HEARING THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED NOV-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIER, LUIS ALBERTO
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
- RETURN MAIL, SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION - SENT TO PLAITIFF, UNABLE TO FORWARD. -
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTIUE ORDER/ SENT TO PLAINTIFF; UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DARYL BREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LILIA SIERRA MIER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS ALBERTO MIER IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS BROKEN; DEFENDANTS MADE 3 PAYMENTS OF $1000 FOR A TOTAL OF $3000 OF THE $4000 AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED NOV-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIER, LILIA SIERRA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-22-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DARYL BREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LILIA SIERRA MIER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS MIER, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT LUIS MIER IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT WILL PAY CHECKS TO PLAINTIFF AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WILL PAY $3000 ON JAN 2ND, FEB 3RD AND A FINAL PAYMENT OF $4000 ON MARCH 2ND. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE PROGRESS REPORT HEARINGS IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING(S) THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED FOR TWO WEEKS, AFTER THE NEXT SCHEDULED PAYMENT OF FEBRUARY 3RD AND TWO WEEKS AFTER THE FINAL SCHEDULED PAYMENT IN MARCH, TO ALLOW FOR THE DEFENDANTS CHECKS TO CLEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-21-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DARYL BREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LILIA SIERRA MIER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HER HUSBAND LUIS ALBERTO MIER. PARTIES CAME TO ANOTHER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON THE REMAINING BALANCE OF $4000. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $1000 BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND SUBSEQUENTLY THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THIS MATTER FOR ANOTHER 30 DAYS AND WILL REPEAT THESE CONTINUANCES FOR A TOTAL OF FOUR MONTHS WITH AN END DATE OF MARCH 2021 PARTIES MUST APPEAR IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING THE PROGRESS REPORT WILL BE CONTINUED FOR ONE MONTH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BREEN, DARYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIER, LILIA SIERRA MIER, LUIS ALBERTO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-24-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HUSBAND IS APPEARING FOR WIFE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIER, LILIA SIERRA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MIER, LILIA SIERRA MIER, LUIS ALBERTO

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PROGRESS REPORT. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR CASE WAS DISMISSED AT LAST HEARING FOR NO APPEARANCE. DISMISSAL IS VACATED. MATTER IS PUT BACK ON CALENDAR. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE PROGRESS REPORT HEARINGS IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING(S) THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-26-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (JR/506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2021 - JUDGMENT.
